creator: jgh@FreeBSD.org
text:
Have you considered adding support for disabling nls? I know some software
allows for this option, however if they work with that option is another
issue.

http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/using-gettext.html#AEN3323

Thanks,
Jason

-- 
Jason Helfman         | FreeBSD Committer
jgh@FreeBSD.org       | http://people.freebsd.org/~jgh
